svg.metadata: {"_description":"ETL data pipeline from multiple sources into a data warehouse.","type":"flow","title":"ETL pipeline","nodes":[{"id":"s1","label":"PostgreSQL","kind":"rectangle"},{"id":"s2","label":"MongoDB","kind":"rectangle"},{"id":"s3","label":"S3 logs","kind":"rectangle"},{"id":"extract","label":"Extract","kind":"rectangle","accent":"link"},{"id":"trans","label":"Transform\n(dbt)","kind":"rectangle","accent":"link"},{"id":"load","label":"Load","kind":"rectangle","accent":"link"},{"id":"wh","label":"Snowflake\nwarehouse","kind":"rectangle","accent":"accent"},{"id":"bi","label":"Looker / BI","kind":"ellipse"}],"edges":[{"from":"s1","to":"extract"},{"from":"s2","to":"extract"},{"from":"s3","to":"extract"},{"from":"extract","to":"trans"},{"from":"trans","to":"load"},{"from":"load","to":"wh"},{"from":"wh","to":"bi","label":"query"}]}
